ShortDescription.Value: Hide alert icons, add/remove money, enable achievements, track money, set milestones.

Publish.LongDescription:
- City Watchdog helps reduce city alert icon clutter and adds convenient city setup tools. - It's modeled on the original City Controller mod (retired) and has many expanded features.
### Features
- Show or hide notification alert icons. - Built-in Achievement Fixer and achievement repair tools. - Change the Milestone you start with (if you want Trains now, you can have it!).
#### Money
- Manual add/subtract money controls using hotkeys. - Automatic add money option. - Trend Tracker for money/population toolbar values. - Convert saves from Unlimited money type to normal Limited money.
Hotkeys - N = toggle all notification icons on/off. - [ = Add Money - ] = Subtract Money
### Important Notes - City Watchdog hides/shows alert icons; it does not fix the city problem behind the icons. Good for making videos and reducing stress. - Make a backup before converting an Unlimited Money save. Mod cannot undo that conversion. - Achievement Fixer (AF) mod is included in City Watchdog; you can remove the standalone AF mod if you like. - City Watchdog itself is a heavily rewritten, modernized redux/expansion of City Controller. It is not just a copy-paste release and nearly a whole rewrite. I hope you enjoy the new features, better performance, and safety guards! - CWD's Trend Tracker is a ground-up code write of similar money trend info to "Show Text Trends" (retired). All new code for how Trends implements vanilla CS2 component extensions, custom CWD settings options, localization, and custom new money tooltip design options.
### Support and feedback Feedback is welcome through GitHub or Discord links on the right. If you like free mods, give a Like, easy way to show support :)
### Future - 9 languages supported, more needed. - If anyone can make better Thumbnail and screenshots, please let me know.
### Credits - River Mochi - mod author and maintainer - Thanks to Mbyron26 for the original City Controller mod - Thanks to DanielVNZ for Show Text Trends inspiration. - Dorkington - tester/feature suggestion - Flightech, SonNathan - testers - Thumbnail photograph by Maryia Shedava at Mont Saint-Michel in Normandy, France https://unsplash.com/photos/a-dog-poses-in-front-of-a-distant-castle-bEpjaU_CTcM
